question: Describe a time you disagreed with a teammate and how you resolved it.
candidateAnswer: I really enjoy working with React and TypeScript. I've been building web apps for about five years now and I love how the ecosystem has evolved. Tailwind is also great. I think my favorite project was a dashboard I built last year — it had a lot of charts.
idealFollowUpExamples: Let's come back to the question — tell me about a specific disagreement with a teammate.
